name: Kilograms to Pounds Converter
description: Industrial-grade mass conversion tool with precision validation, loss analysis, and confidence-adjusted outputs compliant with ISO 80000-1 and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Mass in Kilograms
inputs.businessContext: Input mass value in kilograms for conversion to pounds. Used in logistics, manufacturing, and trade.

businessContext_i18n.en: Input mass value in kilograms for conversion to pounds. Used in logistics, manufacturing, and trade.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pound'a dönüştürmek için kilogram cinsinden kütle değeri girin. Lojistik, imalat ve ticarette kullanılır.

inputs.label: Precision Level
inputs.businessContext: Select number of decimal places for output rounding, per ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select number of decimal places for output rounding, per ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 80000-1 yuvarlama kurallarına göre çıktı yuvarlaması için ondalık basamak sayısını seçin.

inputs.label: Use Industry Rounding (WERC)
inputs.businessContext: Apply WERC standard rounding (0.5 up) for trade compliance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Apply WERC standard rounding (0.5 up) for trade compliance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ticaret uyumu için WERC standart yuvarlamasını (%0,5 yukarı) uygulayın.

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated uncertainty in the input measurement, used for confidence adjustment (ISO/IEC Guide 98-3).

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated uncertainty in the input measurement, used for confidence adjustment (ISO/IEC Guide 98-3).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Giriş ölçümündeki tahmini belirsizlik, güven ayarı için kullanılır (ISO/IEC Kılavuzu 98-3).

rules.message: Mass exceeds maximum allowed value (1,000,000 kg).
Measurement uncertainty must be between 0% and 10%.
Precision level must be an integer from 0 to 6.

thresholds.message: Mass exceeds 50,000 kg; verify handling capacity.
Measurement uncertainty >5%; results may be unreliable.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
